chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1074 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing. 19.01.2018. Mr. Karamullah Memon, Advocate for applicant. Shahzado Salim Nahyoon, D.P.G for the State Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned Counsel for applicant has filed statement for withdrawal of this bail application and according to him, the accused has been acquitted by the trial court and this bail application has become infructuous, therefore, he prays the this bail application may be disposed of. In view of above, this bail application is disposed of as withdrawn. JUDGE Ali Haider
